docs.title: 🚀 Key Features
docs.text: Feature Benefit Algorithmic Trading Model Automatic pricing and guaranteed liquidity Trading Rewards Earn 1.8%-4.1% on every transaction Referral Program Build your network and earn passive income Multi-Asset Support Trade crypto, NFTs, and digital collectibles Multi-Chain Access assets across multiple blockchains Fractional NFTs Own portions of valuable NFTs

docs.title: 💡 Why XPLR?
docs.text:
Traditional NFT platforms suffer from: - Low Liquidity - Difficulty finding buyers/sellers - Price Volatility - Extreme price swings based on sentiment - Limited Participation - High barriers to entry

XPLR solves these with: - ✅ Guaranteed liquidity through pooling algorithm - ✅ Stable pricing with automatic appreciation - ✅ Inclusive rewards for all participants - ✅ Community-driven governance

docs.title: 📊 Platform Statistics
docs.text:
• Trading Reward Rate: 1.8% - 4.1% per transaction
  • Referral Bonus: Up to 1.3% + piggy bank rewards
  • User Levels: 6 levels with increasing benefits
  • Daily Reservations: Up to 11 per day (LV6)
  • Auction Price Range: $1 - $50,000+

docs.title: 🎓 Learn More
docs.text:
This whitepaper contains comprehensive information about XPLR's architecture, mechanisms, and how to participate. Navigate through the sections using the menu on the left to explore:

  1. How XPLR works - Our innovative pooling algorithm
  2. How to earn - Trading and referral rewards

  4. Platform features - All available functions

docs.title: Core Architecture
docs.text: XPLR employs a hybrid off-chain/on-chain system. Off-chain orders (Maker Orders) are EIP-712 signatures stored off-chain. The system includes a Currency Manager, Execution Manager, and NFT Transfer Selector (supporting ERC-2981 royalty standard).

docs.title: Security System
docs.text:
• Defense System: Artificial intelligence + smart contracts, defending against DDoS attacks and HTTPS encryption.
  • Triple Protection: First layer: physical isolation; Second layer: bidirectional encryption and review mechanisms; Third layer: system data backup and seamless server switching.
  • Security Audit: Includes contract logic audit, gas consumption audit, reentrancy attack audit, overflow audit, and more, with all results passing.
  • Wallet Security: Cold and hot wallet separation, independently developed dedicated wallet tools, defense-in-depth, and continuous security code audits.

docs.title: System Features
docs.text: The system features high throughput (second-level confirmation), interoperability (cross-chain mechanisms), high liquidity, and convenience (providing API services).

docs.title: Assets Integrated Trading Platform
docs.text: XPLR covers a wide range of assets including native crypto assets, brand IPs, crypto art, chain game items, and metaverse assets. It serves as a one-stop hub for all digital asset trading needs.

docs.title: Support multi-chain NFT ecosystem
docs.text: XPLR gradually integrates Ethereum, Polygon, BSC, TRON, and other blockchains, supporting multi-chain asset exchange to maximize liquidity and user accessibility.

docs.title: Support multiple types of NFT assets
docs.text: The platform supports various asset types including intellectual property, music, artwork, tickets, video streaming, 3D assets, and more, catering to diverse creator and collector needs.

docs.title: Combination Sale
docs.text: XPLR supports bundling multiple NFTs for sale. This is particularly useful for chain game items where a complete set (e.g., armor, weapon, shield) holds more value than individual pieces.

docs.title: FNFT
docs.text: Fractional NFTs (FNFT) divide complete NFTs into multiple fragments. This allows multiple parties to own portions of high-value assets, significantly lowering participation barriers and improving overall market liquidity.

docs.title: Minting
docs.text: Developers or players can post requests to mint NFTs and earn commissions. This feature is unlocked for advanced users (LV5 and LV6), ensuring high-quality asset creation on the platform.

docs.title: NFT Auction
docs.text: Sellers can set a minimum price and time limit for their NFTs. The highest bidder wins the auction. Different user levels have access to different auction price ranges, from $1-10 for beginners up to $10,000-50,000 for LV6 users.

docs.title: Transactions
docs.text: Sellers can display NFTs on the XPLR platform with options for fixed price sales or live auctions. The algorithmic model ensures that liquidity is maintained regardless of the chosen method.

docs.title: Referral Reward
docs.text:
Users can earn referral rewards from three generations of team members' transactions, including Referral Trading Rewards and Referral Piggy Bank Rewards.

Level Referral Reward Referral Piggy Bank Reward A-Level Referral B-Level Referral C-Level Referral Piggy Bank Release Rate LV2 0.90% 0.40% 0.55% 0.25% 0.10% 20% LV3 1.00% 0.30% 0.60% 0.30% 0.10% 40% LV4 1.10% 0.20% 0.65% 0.30% 0.15% 60% LV5 1.20% 0.10% 0.65% 0.35% 0.20% 80% LV6 1.30% 0% 0.70% 0.40% 0.20% 100%

Piggy Bank Mechanism: Referral rewards are deposited into the piggy bank according to individual level coefficients. When levels increase, the piggy bank reward coefficient decreases while the real-time trading reward coefficient increases. Each upgrade releases piggy bank balance proportionally. Validity period is 365 days.

Reserve Jar: Provides additional high-commission income for enthusiasts, requiring specific conditions (e.g., 1 year of participation, with 36 direct A-level referrals, 66 B-level referrals, and 66 C-level referrals).

docs.title: Trading Reward
docs.text:
Users receive different rewards based on the transaction price range:

Price Range Trading Reward $50-500 1.8% $500-2,000 2.1% $2,000-5,000 2.6% $5,000-10,000 3.1% $10,000-30,000 3.7% $30,000-50,000 4.1%

Reservation Deposit: When reserving an NFT, the account must have sufficient balance. If the reservation fails, assets will not be deducted; funds are only deducted upon successful reservation.

docs.title: Automatic Pricing, Fractional Transactions
docs.text:
The platform integrates an automatic pricing mechanism where user-purchased NFTs appreciate at a fixed rate of 4.3%-6.8% with each transaction.

By utilizing Fractional NFTs (FNFTs), XPLR divides complete NFTs into multiple fragments, allowing multiple parties to own portions, lowering participation barriers and improving liquidity.

docs.title: Community Incentives
docs.text:
XPLR is built on a strong community foundation. Users are incentivized to participate through various mechanisms including trading rewards, referral rewards, and the unique Piggy Bank and Reserve Jar systems.

Active community members can upgrade their user levels to unlock higher daily reservation quotas and access to premium NFT auction price ranges.

docs.title: Innovative Algorithmic Trading Model-Pooling Algorithm Model
docs.text:
XPLR's core trading algorithm is the Pooling Algorithm Model, designed to efficiently centralize NFT transaction matching and settlement:

  • Pooling Trades: Unlike traditional direct matching between buyers and sellers, all NFTs are aggregated in a pool where both buyers and sellers interact directly with the pool, significantly improving liquidity.
  • Instant Settlement: Transaction participants receive immediate results upon participation without waiting for transaction cycles to complete.
  • Enhanced Trading Speed and Efficiency: Centralized trading reduces waiting time for matching.
  • Optimized Liquidity: Attracts more market participants, reducing transaction execution time and costs.

docs.title: FAQ
docs.text:
Q: What is XPLR? A: XPLR is the world's first comprehensive NFT trading platform based on algorithmic trading.

Q: How does the Pooling Algorithm Model work? A: It aggregates all NFTs in a pool where buyers and sellers interact directly, ensuring instant settlement and continuous liquidity.

Q: How do I earn rewards? A: You can earn trading rewards (1.8% to 4.1% per transaction depending on price range) and referral rewards from your team's activities.

docs.title: How to use
docs.text: Welcome to the XPLR user guide. Here you will find all the information you need to navigate and utilize the platform effectively.

docs.title: Getting Points
docs.text:
Points are divided into Daily Task Points and Achievement Task Points.

  • Daily Tasks: Such as check-in (5 points), successful reservation (5 points), completing 1 transaction (5 points), personal trading volume reaching $500+ (5 points), etc.
  • Achievement Tasks: Accumulating check-in days, successful reservations, successful transactions, etc., to earn corresponding points and badges.

docs.title: How to Participate in XPLR
docs.text: To participate in XPLR, users need to register an account, connect their wallet, and complete the beginner tasks. Once LV1 is activated by depositing at least $50, users can start participating in regular trading and auctions.

docs.title: User Identity
docs.text:
The platform has six user levels (LV0 - LV6). Users start at LV0 and upgrade by participating in trading and promoting the platform to enjoy more benefits.

User Level Required Points Valid A-Level Referrals Valid B and C-Level Referrals Remarks LV1 / / / Must trade in the beginner zone for 5 days, then deposit at least $50 and activate LV1. LV2 50 2 3 Team Size: 5 LV3 100 5 15 Team Size: 20 LV4 200 10 30 Team Size: 40 LV5 300 20 60 Team Size: 80 LV6 500 30 150 Team Size: 180

Different user levels have different daily reservation quotas and auction price ranges.

docs.title: Background
docs.text:
The NFT market has seen explosive growth, but it currently faces significant challenges:

  1. Lack of Liquidity: Most NFTs are illiquid. Once the initial hype dies down, buyers cannot find sellers, and sellers cannot find buyers.
  2. Price Volatility: Prices are highly susceptible to market sentiment and manipulation.
  3. High Entry Barriers: High prices for premium NFTs prevent average users from participating.

XPLR was created to solve these exact problems through its algorithmic trading model, bringing stability, liquidity, and accessibility to the NFT market.

docs.title: What is XPLR?
docs.text: XPLR is the world's first comprehensive NFT trading platform based on algorithmic trading. We revolutionize how NFTs are bought, sold, and traded by combining innovative technology with community-driven incentives.

docs.title: The Problem We Solve
docs.text: Traditional NFT trading platforms like OpenSea and LooksRare face significant challenges:

docs.title: 🔴 Current Issues
docs.text: Problem Impact Single-Point Listing Model Limited matching between buyers and sellers Market Sentiment Driven Prices heavily influenced by emotion and hype Price Volatility Dramatic price swings create risk for investors Low Liquidity Difficulty selling during market downturns Irrational Behavior Panic selling and FOMO buying distort markets

docs.title: Our Solution: Algorithmic Trading Model
docs.text: XPLR introduces an innovative Algorithmic Trading Model (Pooling Algorithm Model) that addresses all these challenges.

docs.title: ✅ Key Features
docs.text:
Automatic Pricing System - NFT prices automatically appreciate with each transaction - Not driven by market sentiment or speculation - Ensures stable, predictable value growth

Guaranteed Liquidity - All NFTs aggregated in a unified pool - Buyers and sellers interact with the pool, not each other - Instant matching and settlement - No waiting for counterparties

Protected Investors - Stable price appreciation (4.3% - 6.8% per transaction) - Confidence in asset value - Reduced risk of sudden losses

docs.title: 🎯 For Traders
docs.text:
• Predictable Returns - Know exactly what you'll earn
  • Instant Liquidity - Buy or sell anytime
  • Reward Program - Earn 1.8% - 4.1% per transaction

docs.title: 🤝 For Community Members
docs.text:
• Referral Bonuses - Earn up to 1.3% from your network
  • Piggy Bank Rewards - Long-term passive income
  • Level System - Unlock more benefits as you grow

docs.title: 🏗️ For Developers
docs.text:
• Multi-Chain Support - Build across blockchains
  • Minting Opportunities - Create and monetize NFTs
  • Fractional NFTs - Lower barriers to participation

docs.title: Core Innovation: The Pooling Algorithm
docs.text:
Instead of traditional peer-to-peer trading:

Traditional Model:
Buyer ←→ Seller (Direct matching, slow, illiquid)

XPLR Model:
Buyer ↓
    ↓
  POOL (Instant matching, liquid, efficient)
    ↑
Seller ↑

Benefits: - ✅ Centralized trading reduces friction - ✅ Instant settlement without waiting - ✅ Enhanced trading speed and efficiency - ✅ Optimized liquidity attracts more participants - ✅ Lower transaction costs

docs.title: XPLR DAO
docs.text: XPLR is community-driven and governed by DAO. Users acquiring XPLR also obtain governance rights, enabling them to initiate proposals and vote on project development.

docs.title: Disclaimer
docs.text:
• The XPLR project will fully comply with applicable laws and regulations and will strive to obtain all licenses and approvals necessary to conduct business.
  • This whitepaper is not a prospectus or any form of offering document and does not contain any offer to investors or an offer to sell any investment product, securities, or commodity.
  • The XPLR project party reserves the right to revise this whitepaper at an appropriate time with community authorization.
  • The project team has the final interpretation right of the project.
  • Any revisions to this whitepaper will be made available on the XPLR website.

docs.title: Future Expansion
docs.text:
1. Improve Algorithm Mechanisms: Further reduce the entry threshold of the NFT market and expand NFT market boundaries through new algorithmic trading models and inclusive financial models.
  2. Enter the Metaverse: NFT + Metaverse can create a new model for the gaming market.
  3. Expand into Multi-Chain Markets: Continue expanding diverse ecosystems including cloud storage platforms, game distribution platforms, game props trading platforms, and more.
